title: KSBJ-094 Reunion ... Shiori Mochida
description: My husband lived a gentle and happy life without any inconvenience. One day, when I returned from shopping, my husband brought a customer. When I looked at him to say hello, he was my ex-boyfriend. He is as gentle as he used to be ... Every time I was spoken to, my heart was throbbing, and the thoughts of those days came to me.
